title: amellus strigosus subsp. strigosus
intro: Amellus strigosus subsp. strigosus, also known as the prairie thistle or Canadian thistle, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Amellus strigosus subsp. strigosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or using its roots to make a tincture, which can be taken to leverage its medicinal benefits.
